forecast-period.text: Mostly sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 27 to 32.
High
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the north in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, most likely later tonight. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm during this afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 25 to 40 km/h during the day then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers from the late morning. A thunderstorm likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower this afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south during this afternoon and evening. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the east this afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 29 to 34.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Hawker, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna from the late morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly before dawn then tending south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 32.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning then tending northeast to southeasterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Woomera in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to the low 20s with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 34.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 31 to 37.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 19 and 24 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 30s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek in the morning. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 37.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 26.
